title: cleistanthus ferrugineus
intro: Cleistanthus ferrugineus, also known as the rust-leaved cleistanthus, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, characterized by its distinctive rust-colored leaves. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cleistanthus ferrugineus include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism and arthritis, and exhibiting hepatoprotective properties. In traditional medicine, Cleistanthus ferrugineus is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal formulations such as capsules or tinctures.
